hypothesis: If LLM agents are allowed to iteratively design experiments and access sensor data in both the Alien Market and ALP reactor simulations, then they will autonomously discover the hidden rule that items containing letters 'p' or 'm' are rejected and infer the governing reaction pathways and optimal process conditions, as validated by alignment with expert labels and UMAP-based reference states, because iterative interrogation and data-driven experimentation enable discovery of unknown rules.
